segments.lat: Asturam veni viii Kal. vesperi . vitandi enim caloris causa Lanuvi tris horas acquieveram. tu velim, si grave non erit, efficias ne ante Nonas mihi illuc veniendum sit (id potes per Egnatium Maximum), illud in primis, cum Publilio me absente conficias. de quo quae fama sit scribes. id populus curat scilicet! non me hercule arbitror; etenim haec decantata erat fabula. sed complere paginam volui. quid plura? ipse enim adsum, nisi quid tu prorogas. scripsi enim ad te de hortis.
segments.eng: I reached Astura on the evening of the eighth day before the Kalends. To get out of the heat, I had rested three hours at Lanuvium. Please --- if it will not be a great trouble --- see to it that I do not have to come up there before the Nones (you can manage that through Egnatius Maximus), and above all settle the business with Publilius in my absence. Whatever the talk about that may be, you will write. The People take an interest in it, of course! By Hercules, I do not think so; the story was sung threadbare long ago. But I wanted to fill out the page. What more is there? I myself shall be there, unless you put me off. I have already written to you about the gardens.
